# growthbook_ramp_schedule_template (Data Source)

Look up an existing GrowthBook ramp schedule template by ID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Unique ramp schedule template identifier.

### Read-Only

- `date_created` (String) Creation timestamp (RFC3339).
- `date_updated` (String) Last update timestamp (RFC3339).
- `end_patch` (Attributes) Patch applied when the schedule completes. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--end_patch))
- `lockdown_config` (Attributes) Lockdown configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--lockdown_config))
- `monitoring_config` (Attributes) Monitoring configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--monitoring_config))
- `name` (String) Template name.
- `official` (Boolean) Whether the template is org-official.
- `order` (Number) Display order within the org.
- `steps` (Attributes List) Ordered ramp steps. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--steps))

<a id="nestedatt--end_patch"></a>
### Nested Schema for `end_patch`

Read-Only:

- `all_environments` (Boolean) Apply to all environments.
- `condition` (String) Targeting condition (JSON string).
- `coverage` (Number) Traffic fraction (0-1).
- `environments` (List of String) Environments.
- `prerequisites` (Attributes List) Feature prerequisites. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--end_patch--prerequisites))
- `saved_groups` (Attributes List) Saved group targeting clauses. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--end_patch--saved_groups))

<a id="nestedatt--end_patch--prerequisites"></a>
### Nested Schema for `end_patch.prerequisites`

Read-Only:

- `condition` (String) Prerequisite condition (JSON string).
- `id` (String) Prerequisite feature ID.


<a id="nestedatt--end_patch--saved_groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `end_patch.saved_groups`

Read-Only:

- `ids` (List of String) Saved group IDs.
- `match` (String) Match type.



<a id="nestedatt--lockdown_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `lockdown_config`

Read-Only:

- `mode` (String) Lockdown mode.


<a id="nestedatt--monitoring_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `monitoring_config`

Read-Only:

- `auto_update` (Boolean) Auto-update analysis.
- `datasource_id` (String) Datasource ID.
- `exposure_query_id` (String) Exposure query ID.
- `guardrail_metric_ids` (List of String) Guardrail metric IDs.
- `monitoring_mode` (String) Monitoring mode.
- `multiple_exposure_action` (String) Multiple exposure action.
- `no_traffic_action` (String) No-traffic action.
- `no_traffic_grace_period_hours` (Number) No-traffic grace period (hours).
- `signal_metric_ids` (List of String) Signal metric IDs.
- `srm_action` (String) SRM action.
- `update_schedule_minutes` (Number) Refresh interval minutes.


<a id="nestedatt--steps"></a>
### Nested Schema for `steps`

Read-Only:

- `actions` (Attributes List) Step actions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--steps--actions))
- `approval_notes` (String) Approval notes.
- `hold_conditions` (Attributes) Advancement gating conditions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--steps--hold_conditions))
- `interval` (Number) Hold duration in seconds (null = no time gate).
- `monitored` (Boolean) Whether the step runs traffic analysis.

<a id="nestedatt--steps--actions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `steps.actions`

Read-Only:

- `patch` (Attributes) Feature-rule patch. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--steps--actions--patch))
- `target_id` (String) Target feature ID.
- `target_type` (String) Target type.

<a id="nestedatt--steps--actions--patch"></a>
### Nested Schema for `steps.actions.patch`

Read-Only:

- `all_environments` (Boolean) Apply to all environments.
- `condition` (String) Targeting condition (JSON string).
- `coverage` (Number) Traffic fraction (0-1).
- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable/disable the rule.
- `environments` (List of String) Environments.
- `prerequisites` (Attributes List) Feature prerequisites. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--steps--actions--patch--prerequisites))
- `rule_id` (String) Feature rule ID.
- `saved_groups` (Attributes List) Saved group targeting clauses. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--steps--actions--patch--saved_groups))

<a id="nestedatt--steps--actions--patch--prerequisites"></a>
### Nested Schema for `steps.actions.patch.prerequisites`

Read-Only:

- `condition` (String) Prerequisite condition (JSON string).
- `id` (String) Prerequisite feature ID.


<a id="nestedatt--steps--actions--patch--saved_groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `steps.actions.patch.saved_groups`

Read-Only:

- `ids` (List of String) Saved group IDs.
- `match` (String) Match type.




<a id="nestedatt--steps--hold_conditions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `steps.hold_conditions`

Read-Only:

- `min_sample_size` (Number) Minimum sample size.
- `requires_approval` (Boolean) Whether approval is required.
